nodes.name: New Product Row (Google Sheets)
nodes.notes: Watches a Google Sheet. You paste a supplier product URL into column 'source_url' and this fires. Columns expected: source_url, status.

nodes.name: Fetch Product Page (HTML)
nodes.notes: Fetches the supplier page THROUGH ScraperAPI (render=true runs JS, rotates IPs, solves most blocks). Get a free key at scraperapi.com (1000 free calls/mo) and paste it over YOUR_SCRAPERAPI_KEY. To skip ScraperAPI and hit the site directly, set the URL to just: ={{ $json.source_url }}

nodes.name: AI: Extract Product Data
nodes.notes: Sends the HTML to Claude to pull structured product data. Set your Anthropic API key in the header.

nodes.name: Create Product in Shopify (DRAFT)
nodes.notes: Creates the product as a DRAFT (published:false) so you review before it goes live. Flip published:true once you trust the line. Images are attached in the next step.

nodes.name: Attach Image to Product
nodes.notes: Uploads each product image. If your Shopify node version lacks productImage, use an HTTP node POSTing to /admin/api/2024-01/products/{id}/images.json

nodes.name: Save Ad Creative to Queue
nodes.notes: Everything you need to launch an ad lands in one row: hook, FB copy, TikTok caption, image. You review and hit launch manually (the gated step).
